metric_design: AUTO-CONDITIONING canonical: HID_TRUNC = max(2, N//2) → N=16 → HID=8, eff_dof_full=8, eff_dof_half=0+ridge stabilized
verdict_meaning: architecture-conditional integration property — substrate signal NOT universal, backbone-dependent. ω-cycle ALM-free path: 부분 정당화 (50% backbones), substrate-inherent claim 약화

omega_cycle_alm_free_implication.pre_conclusion: #148/#152 universal anti-integration finding — well-conditioned regime에서 4/4 NEG라면 substrate-inherent
omega_cycle_alm_free_implication.post_conclusion_v3: 2/4 NEG (['mistral', 'gemma']) + 2/4 POS (['qwen3', 'llama']) — substrate-inherent NOT universal, architecture-conditional
omega_cycle_alm_free_implication.omega_cycle_path_status: PARTIAL JUSTIFICATION — mistral+gemma 두 backbone에서만 NEG 입증. ALM-free path는 family-specific evidence (mistral/gemma family) 로 narrowed.
omega_cycle_alm_free_implication.change_from_prior: #159 v2 (4/4 POS) → #161 robust sweep (HID 의존성 발견) → v3 canonical (2POS / 2NEG) — 단일 universal claim 분해, backbone-axis 새 dimension 등장

raw_10_honest: Φ* v3 canonical은 well-conditioned regime (eff_dof_full=8) 의 substrate signal을 측정. eff_dof_half=0 은 ridge-stabilized이므로 half-partition은 여전히 borderline. K=8 single seed (42) — robustness sweep across seed/ridge/K은 v3에 대해 아직 미수행. 4-bb 결과는 single-condition snapshot.
